name: Fresh Ginger Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons lemon zest with some pith
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F.
Grease 16 muffin pans.
If using a food processor, process the ginger until it is in tiny pieces. Otherwise, hand chop it into fine pieces. You should have about 1/4 cup. It is better to use too much ginger than too little.
Put the ginger and 1/4 cup of sugar in a small skillet over medium heat. Cook until the sugar has melted and the mixture is hot. Do not walk away from the pan; the sugar will melt quickly. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
Process the lemon zest with 3 tablespoons sugar in a food processor, or sprinkle the sugar over the zest and chop by hand. Add the lemon-zest mixture to the ginger mixture and set aside.
Beat the butter slightly in a mixing bowl. Add the remaining 1/2 cup sugar and beat until smooth. Add the eggs and beat well. Add the buttermilk and mix until blended. Add the flour, salt, and baking soda and beat until smooth. Add the lemon-ginger mixture and mix well.
Spoon the batter into the muffin cups so that each cup is about 3/4 full. Bake for 15-20 minutes.
Serve warm.
